input.system:
You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

recent_thinks: [0-2] A man wearing a beige baseball cap and a brown hooded sweatshirt stands outdoors in front of a white building with vertical siding. Initially, his eyes are squinted and mouth closed. Within two seconds, he opens his eyes wider and opens his mouth, while the background remains static under a blue sky with a bare tree visible.

[2-4] The man wearing a beige cap and brown hoodie keeps his mouth open, displaying his upper teeth while facing forward. His eyes remain open and focused on the camera lens. The background environment, including the white building with vertical siding and the bare tree under a blue sky, stays consistent without movement or lighting shifts.

[4-6] The man closes his mouth, shifting from an open position showing teeth to a sealed, neutral expression. He continues facing forward toward the camera lens. The beige cap with a visible logo stays on his head. Background elements, including the white siding and parked vehicle, remain unchanged under the blue sky.

samples.output: <think>The man opens his mouth slightly, revealing his upper teeth again while facing the camera. He continues wearing the beige cap and brown hoodie. The background environment, including the white building with vertical siding and the parked vehicle, remains unchanged under the blue sky.</think><action>silent</action>

compressed_segments.text: A man wearing a beige baseball cap with a logo and a brown hooded sweatshirt stands outdoors, filming himself in a close-up shot. Behind him is a white building with vertical siding and a louvered vent near the roofline, set against a blue sky with a bare tree and a parked vehicle visible to the right. Throughout the video, the man faces the camera directly. Initially, his eyes are squinted and mouth closed, but he quickly opens his eyes and mouth to begin speaking. He continues to articulate, his mouth shifting between open positions revealing his upper teeth and closed, neutral expressions. His gaze remains fixed on the camera lens. The background remains static with no changes in lighting or object positions, indicating a continuous take in a stable environment. The man's facial expressions change primarily through his mouth movements as he speaks, while his head position remains relatively steady.

From 14s to 26s, a man in a beige cap and brown hoodie faces the camera, articulating speech with varying mouth openings. He stands before a static background comprising a white building with vertical siding, a bare tree, and a silver vehicle under a blue sky. His expression shifts slightly as he talks, maintaining forward eye contact. At 26s, a cross-dissolve transition occurs, replacing the outdoor scene with a close-up interior view. The final shot focuses on a mechanical component within a dark enclosure, specifically showing a metal bracket secured by bolts, while the previous background elements fade out completely.

[28-30] The camera focuses on a grey metal bracket secured with bolts inside a dark cavity, showing a label with "116", before being completely obscured by a blurry pinkish-tan surface. [30-34] An extreme close-up reveals a hairy, pinkish-tan forearm with a dark grey textured watch strap, transitioning to a sunlit palm with deep creases. [34-38] The hand reaches toward the machinery, with fingers and a hairy forearm moving over the grey bracket and bolts, partially blocking the view of the shadowed enclosure. [38-40] The frame is filled entirely by pinkish skin texture and creases as the hand shifts position. [40-42] The skin obstruction moves away to reveal the grey metal bracket and bolts again, while a hand holds a shiny chrome socket tool near the mechanical parts.

recent_thinks: [42-44] The hand holding the shiny chrome socket tool withdraws from the frame, clearing the view of the mechanical assembly. The grey metal bracket secured with bolts inside the dark cavity is fully visible again. A label on the bracket displays the number 116, illuminated by bright sunlight within the shadowed enclosure.

[44-46] The static shot continues to focus on the grey metal bracket bolted inside a dark cavity. Sunlight highlights the surface and a label reading '116'. The hand and chrome tool seen previously are absent, leaving the mechanical part fully visible and unchanged throughout the duration.

samples.output: <think>A grey metal bracket secured with bolts and displaying the number 116 remains stationary within a shadowed cavity. Sunlight highlights the component's surface. A shiny chrome tool enters from the upper right corner, angling downward toward the mechanical assembly, partially obscuring the view.</think><action>silent</action>

Throughout the video, the man faces the camera directly. Initially, his eyes are squinted and mouth closed, but he quickly opens his eyes and mouth to begin speaking. He continues to articulate, his mouth shifting between open positions revealing his upper teeth and closed, neutral expressions. His gaze remains fixed on the camera lens. The background remains static with no changes in lighting or object positions, indicating a continuous take in a stable environment. The man's facial expressions change primarily through his mouth movements as he speaks, while his head position remains relatively steady. From 14s to 26s, a man in a beige cap and brown hoodie faces the camera, articulating speech with varying mouth openings. He stands before a static background comprising a white building with vertical siding, a bare tree, and a silver vehicle under a blue sky. His expression shifts slightly

[28-30] The camera focuses on a grey metal bracket secured with bolts inside a dark cavity, showing a label with "116", before being completely obscured by a blurry pinkish-tan surface. [30-34] An extreme close-up reveals a hairy, pinkish-tan forearm with a dark grey textured watch strap, transitioning to a sunlit palm with deep creases. [34-38] The hand reaches toward the machinery, with fingers and a hairy forearm moving over the grey bracket and bolts, partially blocking the view of the shadowed enclosure. [38-40] The frame is filled entirely by pinkish skin texture and creases as the hand shifts position. [40-42] The skin obstruction moves away to reveal the grey metal bracket and bolts again, while a hand holds a shiny chrome socket tool near the mechanical parts.

[42-46] A hand holding a shiny chrome socket tool withdraws from the frame, clearing the view of a grey metal bracket secured with bolts inside a dark cavity. A label on the bracket displays the number "116", illuminated by bright sunlight within the shadowed enclosure. The static shot continues to focus on the bracket, leaving the mechanical part fully visible and unchanged throughout the duration.
[46-50] A shiny chrome tool enters from the upper right corner, angling downward toward the mechanical assembly. A person's arm, covered in a brown sleeve and sporting a watch with a silver clasp, enters the frame. This movement significantly obstructs the view of the mechanical assembly, with the brown fabric and wrist dominating the foreground.
[50-56] The brown sleeve and watch withdraw, fully revealing the grey metal bracket secured by bolts with the label "116". A hand enters from the bottom right, positioning a thumb near the mechanical component. A hand wearing a black watch reaches into the dark cavity, fingers extending toward the bracket. The fingers touch the area beside the bolted component inside the shadowed, sunlit enclosure.

[56-60] A hand reaches into a shadowed mechanical enclosure, initially manipulating a small thin metallic object between fingers near a grey metal bracket labeled "116". The hand then positions a white ceramic spark plug with a metal tip and a grey rubber boot connector near the same grey metal box. [60-70] Subsequently, the hand maneuvers a shiny chrome ratchet tool, inserting it into the spark plug hole adjacent to the grey metal component labeled "116". The fingers grip the tool firmly, applying torque and turning it slightly within the dark cavity to engage the internal mechanism. Sunlight continues to illuminate the surrounding metal bracket and bolts as the hand works the instrument.

[70-72] The scene displays a static mechanical assembly inside a dark enclosure, highlighted by sunlight. A grey metal box labeled "116" is visible next to an open threaded hole, with a grey cable hanging loosely nearby and no obstructions in the foreground. [72-76] A hand enters the lower right foreground holding a white ceramic spark plug with a threaded silver metal base. The fingers grip the plug, positioning it directly in front of the open port adjacent to the "116" box. [76-84] The hand inserts the spark plug into the threaded hole, pushing it deeper into the dark cavity. Fingers wrap around the white ceramic insulator while the thumb presses against the side to guide and stabilize the component. The hand maintains a firm grip, advancing the plug until it is seated securely near the bolted bracket and hanging cable within the machinery housing. The thumb rests near the opening to ensure stability as the plug is fully inserted into the port next to the grey metal component, completing the installation process within the shadowed enclosure.

[86-88] A hand continues to manipulate a white ceramic spark plug inside the dark enclosure. [92-94] A hand continues pressing the blue rubber boot connector into place beside the grey metal box labeled 116. input.system:
You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
